expectations.text: Defines a complete map-to-battle-to-reward-to-boss vertical slice with explicit exclusions.
expectations.evidence: Defines title/map/two normal battles/rewards/workshop/boss/result and a constrained v1 scope.

expectations.text: Invents a desert/mechanical second construction axis that changes decisions rather than only adding stats.
expectations.evidence: Six-slot city pulse track changes card order, placement, direction and boss counterplay.

expectations.text: Separates profile state from run state and addresses save schema migration.
expectations.evidence: Separates profile/run/pending and requires versioned migration for pulse direction, module turn state and route edges.

expectations.text: Includes click/target/cancel interaction contracts and multi-target behavior.
expectations.evidence: Defines enemy/self targets, invalid targets, repeat/blank/Escape cancellation, defeated targets and a two-enemy validation battle.

expectations.text: Includes mobile height and breakpoint tests, public deployment verification, and cache busting.
expectations.evidence: Includes 844×390, 780×430, 568×320, breakpoint ±1px, commit verification and CSS/JS version tags.

expectations.text: Avoids nautical, rust, tide, and copied Slay the Spire expression.
expectations.evidence: Keeps the setting, systems and expression desert/mechanical and explicitly excludes copied card frames, characters and maps.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are substantive and expose differences in migration, multi-target, and release discipline.
